truths.description: Company compacts powders using mechanical force
truths.rejection_sentence: Company does not appear to perform powder compaction using a tablet press or equivalent equipment.

truths.description: Primary product is a tablet, pellet, or pressed solid
truths.rejection_sentence: Pressed solid dosage forms are not a primary product.

truths.description: Tooling affects quality, yield, or consistency
truths.rejection_sentence: Tooling performance does not appear to materially affect product quality or yield.
Formulation variables do not appear to influence compaction behavior.

truths.description: Scale-up affects compaction or tooling behavior
truths.rejection_sentence: Scale-up considerations are not evident in compaction or tooling processes.

truths.description: Process is press-based, not molded or liquid
truths.rejection_sentence: Manufacturing process appears to be molded or liquid rather than press-based.

truths.description: Manufacturing or R&D is performed internally
truths.rejection_sentence: Manufacturing or process R&D does not appear to be handled internally.
Performance or regulatory specifications do not appear to drive process decisions.
